title: Verified resource/helpline information pack (dated, authoritative-sourced)
context: GATED: This task is part of M4 which is attempted ONLY if an oncologist + patient-advocate reviewer pair is secured; otherwise it is formally skipped. HIGH risk: any helpline or resource information a member of the public could rely on must be verified against an authoritative current source, dated, and confirmed accurate. Stale or incorrect helpline information is a patient-safety failure. Depends on: disparities-analysis-explainer-014.
objective: Compile and verify a resource and helpline information pack to accompany the public explainer. Every entry must be independently verified against an authoritative current source (e.g. NCI 1-800-4-CANCER, 988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline, ACS, CDC) with a recorded lastVerified date. A staleness check must pass before publication. Zero incorrect or stale entries at publish. Oncologist + patient-advocate sign-off required (blocking).
acceptanceCriteria: Every helpline and resource item is verified against an authoritative, current source (e.g. NCI 1-800-4-CANCER, 988, ACS Cancer Action Network, CDC) with the authoritative source URL recorded
Every entry carries a lastVerified date (the date the item was confirmed against the authoritative source)
A staleness check is run before publication: any entry whose lastVerified date exceeds the configured staleness window fails the check and must be re-verified
Zero incorrect or stale entries at time of publication: all entries confirmed accurate and current against authoritative sources
Resource information is scoped to navigation, support, and cancer information resources — not clinical guidance or individual screening recommendations
Oncologist sign-off recorded before merge (blocking): clinical accuracy and safety of all resource information verified
Patient-advocate sign-off recorded before merge (blocking): relevance, accessibility, and appropriateness for affected communities verified
output: A verified, dated resource and helpline information pack document with every entry confirmed against authoritative sources (lastVerified dated), staleness check passed, and blocking oncologist + patient-advocate sign-off recorded.
